# Release notes


## cfDNAlab v/ 0.0.1

Adds the following public commands:

 - `cfdna fcoverage`
 - `cfdna lengths`
 - `cfdna midpoints`
 - `cfdna gc-bias`
 - `cfdna coverage-weights`
 - `cfdna bam-to-bam`
 - `cfdna bam-to-frag` 
 - `cfdna frag-to-bam`
 - `cfdna ref-gc-bias`

Multiple other commands are being built. While they are technically present in the codebase (not build with standard flags though), they are either not tested properly or outright won't work. Commands are made "public" when they work and have been properly tested.
